case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF THE CALIFORNIA VS. BANKERS INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF THE CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT BANKERS INSURANCE COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
